intent.title: Agent intent
intent.description: Natural-language description of what data the agent expects. E.g. 'restaurants in NYC that offer delivery'.

actorId.title: Target actor ID
actorId.description: The Apify actor to run as the scraper. E.g. 'apify/google-maps-scraper'.

actorInput.title: Target actor input
actorInput.description: Input object passed verbatim to the target actor.

requiredFields.title: Required fields
requiredFields.description: Field names every item must have (Tier 1 shape check).

sampleSize.title: Tier 2 sample size
sampleSize.description: Number of items to buffer before running the LLM semantic judge.

extraBlocklist.title: Extra block-page phrases
extraBlocklist.description: Additional case-insensitive phrases that mark an item as a block/error page (Tier 1). Use for site-specific anti-bot wording.

downstreamUsdPerMTok.title: Downstream LLM price ($/1M tokens)
downstreamUsdPerMTok.description: Used to estimate the dollars saved by keeping blocked tokens out of the agent's context.

confidenceThreshold.title: Tier 2 mismatch confidence threshold
confidenceThreshold.description: Minimum judge confidence (0-1) to hard-block on an intent mismatch. 0 = strictest (block on any mismatch). Injection and block pages always block.

maxWaitSecs.title: Max upstream wait (seconds)
maxWaitSecs.description: Safety cap on total time waiting for the upstream scraper before failing closed with an upstream_error verdict.

geminiApiKey.title: Gemini API key
geminiApiKey.description: Google AI Studio key for Tier 2 semantic judge. Falls back to keyword heuristic if omitted.
